atomic_proofs.name: simulation_n_plus_1_def
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) = step_encoding (ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n)

atomic_proofs.name: step_applies_to_encoding
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), step_encoding (ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n) is well-defined

atomic_proofs.name: inductive_step_valid
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) = step_encoding (ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n)

atomic_proofs.name: inductive_step_correctness
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) correctly extends simulation

atomic_proofs.name: induction_base
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) 0 = tm_encode (iterate 0 transition tm)

atomic_proofs.name: induction_hypothesis
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n = tm_encode (iterate n transition tm)

atomic_proofs.name: induction_step
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) (n+1) = tm_encode (iterate (n+1) transition tm)

atomic_proofs.name: induction_complete
atomic_proofs.statement: ∀ (tm : TuringMachineState) (n : ℕ), ilda_simulation (tm_encode tm) n = tm_encode (iterate n transition tm)
atomic_proofs.proof_hint: Induction on n using previous lemmas
